blockers.description: No FTP/SSH password available in this environment; SSH key was rejected by hostiman server.
blockers.workaround: User will upload dist.zip and admin files manually and call deploy.php.

human_actions_pending.action: Deploy admin panel: upload public/admin/api/index.php, public/admin/js/admin.js, public/admin/index.html, public/admin/dashboard.html to /admin/ on the server. After first admin login (auto-migration users.json→users.php), DELETE /admin/users.json from the server.
human_actions_pending.context: users.json was publicly downloadable (HTTP 200) — bcrypt hashes exposed. New API stores users in users.php which executes to empty output when accessed via web. Migration is automatic on first getUsers() call.

human_actions_pending.action: Change passwords for ramzes and tagir in the admin panel after deploy; optionally run: git rm --cached public/admin/users.json
human_actions_pending.context: Password hashes must be treated as compromised: they were served publicly by nginx and are in git history.

human_actions_pending.action: Deploy dist.zip via https://sunlife-photo.ru/deploy.php?key=sunlife2025deploy, then Ctrl+F5 to verify (forms, Syktyvkar, partnership map, canonical URLs now sunlife-photo.ru)
human_actions_pending.context: dist.zip contains the site build with meta.json baseUrl fixed to https://sunlife-photo.ru (was sunlife-ufa.ru, leaked into canonical/OG/schema.org).

human_actions_pending.action: Fill SMTP_PASS (mail.ru app password) in api/config.local.php on server
human_actions_pending.context: Email channel currently fails (placeholder password). Without it forms only reach Telegram. Optional: revoke exposed BOT_TOKEN at @BotFather afterwards.

decisions.decision: Store admin users in users.php (PHP file returning an array) instead of users.json, with auto-migration on first read.
decisions.rationale: nginx serves .json statically bypassing Apache/.htaccess protection, so password hashes were publicly downloadable. A .php file is always executed and outputs nothing. Works regardless of server static-file config.

decisions.decision: Default-deny in admin API save action: files outside permissionMap require admin role.
decisions.rationale: site.json and gallery-portfolio.json (and any future files) were writable by any authenticated editor — confirmed privilege escalation in local test.

decisions.decision: Add/delete in admin JS re-renders from local state (loadSection(section, true)) after syncing DOM into currentData, instead of immediate server refetch; uploads save immediately via the same sync helpers.
decisions.rationale: Server refetch after local mutation silently discarded all add/delete operations and unsaved edits (confirmed in puppeteer run).

decisions.decision: Register inline-handler functions via Object.assign(window, {...}) in admin.js.
decisions.rationale: oxlint cannot see references from inline onclick/onchange HTML strings and reported ~49 false-positive unused-vars; explicit registration keeps the linter useful for real dead code (now 0 warnings).

next_action: User confirms, then commit. Deploy: (1) admin files to /admin/ + delete /admin/users.json on server + change both passwords; (2) dist.zip via deploy.php. Then backlog: SMTP_PASS, BOT_TOKEN revoke, cache headers via hostiman panel, todo-011 (privacy, also stale sunlife-ufa.ru mentions in PrivacyPage.tsx and src/content/meta.ts).
context_notes: 2026-07-21: Admin panel full audit done (static + local puppeteer on php -S; scripts/test-admin.cjs 16 scenarios, scripts/test-admin-fixes.cjs 12 scenarios — 12/12 PASS after fixes). Fixed: CRITICAL users.json public hash leak (now users.php + auto-migration, .gitignore'd), HIGH add/delete silent wipe (loadSection fromState + DOM sync), HIGH gallery upload/delete not persisted (+file cleanup on delete), HIGH editor privilege escalation (default-deny), MEDIUM stored XSS escapes, MEDIUM user-delete self/last-admin guards, MEDIUM session hardening (regenerate id, cookie params, login delay, CORS wildcard removed), LOW sizes-string join, empty baseName fallback, admin favicon. meta.json baseUrl fixed to sunlife-photo.ru. tsc 0 errors, oxlint 0 errors/2 pre-existing src warnings, dist.zip flat (no dist/ wrapper, no admin/), prerender 8/8. Test users removed, content restored from snapshot. NOT committed — awaiting user confirmation.
